search.noResultsDescription: No results for the selected filters. Try changing the filters or search.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.privacyConsentRequired: You must accept the privacy policy

account.title: Settings
account.description: Manage your account information, update your personal data, or configure deactivation options.

privacy.title: Privacy and Security
privacy.description: Manage your information, privacy, and security to make MediConnect work better for you

verifyIdentity.title: Verify your identity
verifyIdentity.description: For security, we need to verify it's you. Enter your current password.
verifyIdentity.successMessage: Identity verified without implementing real logic.

changeEmail.title: Change email address
changeEmail.description: Enter your new email address. We'll send you a verification code.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your new email
verifyEmail.instructions: Enter the verification code we sent to
verifyEmail.tip: Didn't receive the code?:Check your spam folder or wait a few minutes.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.description: Enter your current password and the new password you want to set.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: This action will permanently delete your MediConnect account. Once confirmed, you won't be able to recover it or access your information again.
deleteAccount.consequence1: Your profile and all your personal data will be deleted from the system.
deleteAccount.consequence2: You won't be able to log in or recover your account.
deleteAccount.consequence3: All your appointments and connections with doctors or health centers will be cancelled.
deleteAccount.consequence4: Associated messages and records will be irreversibly deleted, following MediConnect's privacy policies.

profileVisibility.title: Professional profile privacy
profileVisibility.description: Control who can see your profile and professional information

messagesPrivacy.title: Message privacy settings
messagesPrivacy.description: Choose who can send you messages based on your account type.

blockedUsers.title: Blocked users
blockedUsers.description: Manage blocked accounts. Blocked users cannot send you messages or view your profile.

pdf.tableInfo: The requested information is presented below.
pdf.successMessage: The PDF document has been generated successfully
pdf.errorMessage: Error generating PDF. Please try again.
